title: Pseudonymity (Not Anonymity)
description: Bitcoin is pseudonymous, not anonymous: addresses are public identifiers that can be linked to real identities through behavior, counterparties, and metadata. Privacy requires active operational practices rather than default assumptions.

resources.title: Pseudonymity
resources.notes: Conceptual baseline distinguishing pseudonymity from anonymity.

resources.title: Lopp: Bitcoin Privacy
resources.notes: Practical privacy failures and defensive techniques for Bitcoin users.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Output Linking
resources.notes: How transaction graph patterns deanonymize pseudonymous activity.
